messages.content: Pluto is the largest, and the second-most massive known dwarf planet in the Solar System. It is the first Kuiper belt object to be discovered. Pluto was originally considered the ninth planet from the Sun. It was reclassified as the largest member of the Kuiper belt, a region of the Solar System consisting of many icy bodies.
which is heavier: 1 kg of feathers or 1 kg of lead?
1 kg of feathers is heavier than 1 kg of lead.
